description_long: This is a medium-sized, tapered cylindrical plant pot with a wide, open mouth and a slightly narrower base. The exterior is adorned with a series of horizontal, irregular white and light gray stripes set against a dark brown background, creating a visually striking, modern look. The pot appears to be made of ceramic or clay, giving it a sturdy and robust feel, while the interior is smooth and unadorned. The rim is thick and rounded, providing structural strength and a finished appearance. The pot's surface is matte with a subtle texture, suggesting a handcrafted or artisanal quality. Its design is both decorative and functional, suitable for urban outdoor or indoor settings.
description: A dark brown, tapered plant pot with irregular white and gray horizontal stripes and a wide, rounded rim. The surface is matte and subtly textured, giving it a modern, handcrafted look.
description_view_0: The plant pot is seen from the front, showing the full width of the mouth and the prominent horizontal stripe pattern.
description_view_1: This view highlights the left side, where the stripes appear slightly denser and the curvature of the pot is more pronounced.
description_view_2: The back view displays the continuous stripe pattern and the even tapering of the pot's body.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the consistent horizontal stripes and the smooth, rounded rim.
attribute_placement_context: ideal for contemporary urban balconies or patios with decorative flair
